title: Simple Voice Chat speaker system
description: A simple serversided microphone to speaker system for simple voice chat.
body:
Made this mod for my Minecraft server. Me and two of the server members have firewatch towers spread around the map and I wanted us to be able to talk without having to meet up first. So now we stick a mic on the wall and a speaker in each tower.

Runs on top of Simple Voice Chat. Tap the mic, pick a speaker from the menu, talk, tap the mic again to send. If you label a few speakers the same name they all play together, so you can hit the whole crew at once.

Server-side only, your friends don't need the mod installed to join.

To use it, run /rspeaker.

### Commands

/rspeaker give mic - give yourself a microphone head

/rspeaker give speaker - give yourself a speaker head

/rspeaker label <text> - label the speaker you're looking at

/rspeaker info - shows role, label, and UUID of the unit you're looking at

# Dependencies
Make sure you have the following installed

- Simple Voice Chat
- Fabric api

That's all for now, more updates coming!
